engines.name: SEO

findings.title: Missing Metadata
findings.issue: No Next.js metadata export was found in the app router.
findings.impact: Search previews, titles, descriptions, and social cards can be incomplete or inconsistent.
findings.recommendation: Add centralized metadata in app/layout.tsx and route-specific metadata where needed.

recommendations: Add OG images for high-value routes

engines.name: Metadata

findings.title: Route metadata not detected
findings.issue: This page does not export metadata or generateMetadata.
findings.impact: Route-level search and social previews may rely on generic defaults.
findings.recommendation: Add route metadata or confirm the inherited layout metadata is sufficient.

recommendations: Use route overrides for important pages

engines.name: Accessibility

findings.title: Missing image alt text
findings.issue: An img element does not include an alt attribute.
findings.impact: Screen reader users cannot understand the purpose of the image.
findings.recommendation: Add meaningful alt text or alt="" for decorative images.

findings.title: Input missing accessible label
findings.issue: An input lacks an id, aria-label, or aria-labelledby attribute.
findings.impact: Assistive technology may announce the control without useful context.
findings.recommendation: Connect the input to a visible label or add an ARIA label.

findings.title: Empty button
findings.issue: A button renders without readable text or accessible naming.
findings.impact: Keyboard and screen reader users cannot identify the action.
findings.recommendation: Add visible text, aria-label, or an accessible icon label.

recommendations: Run browser axe checks before release

findings.title: Raw img element in Next.js UI
findings.issue: The component uses img instead of next/image.
findings.impact: Image optimization, responsive sizing, and CLS prevention can be missed.
findings.recommendation: Use next/image with explicit width, height, and sizes.

findings.title: Client component may be unnecessary
findings.issue: The file is marked use client but no interaction, browser API, or animation usage was detected.
findings.impact: Unneeded client rendering increases JavaScript shipped to users.
findings.recommendation: Convert this file to a Server Component if no client-only behavior exists.

engines.name: Skeleton Coverage

findings.title: Missing skeleton for AnimatedHero
findings.issue: AnimatedHero does not have a matching AnimatedHeroSkeleton component.
findings.impact: Async rendering can show blank or shifting UI during loading states.

findings.title: Missing skeleton for ProductCard
findings.issue: ProductCard does not have a matching ProductCardSkeleton component.
findings.impact: Async rendering can show blank or shifting UI during loading states.

recommendations: Add skeletons for async sections and repeated cards

findings.title: Client directive in page
findings.issue: A Next.js page is marked with use client.
findings.impact: The route loses server-first rendering benefits and can increase bundle size.
findings.recommendation: Move interactive UI into a child client component and keep the page server-only.

engines.name: GSAP

findings.title: Missing GSAP cleanup
findings.issue: GSAP animation code does not appear to call ctx.revert() or use gsap.context().
findings.impact: Animations and ScrollTriggers can leak across route transitions.
findings.recommendation: Wrap animations in gsap.context() and return ctx.revert() from the effect.

recommendations: Keep GSAP isolated to client components

topPriorities: Add centralized metadata in app/layout.tsx and route-specific metadata where needed.
Move interactive UI into a child client component and keep the page server-only.
Add route metadata or confirm the inherited layout metadata is sufficient.
Add visible text, aria-label, or an accessible icon label.
